name: Bhai Kulwinder Singh Raushan
body: Bhai Kulwinder Singh Raushan was a renowned Kirtani trained in classical music and the art of ‘Vyakhya’. He was born in 1944 into the home of Sant Tejpal Singh Bawra, who was a student of legendary figure, Giani Gian Singh Almast Ji. Bhai Kulwinder Singh Raushan was based in the United Kingdom for many years and passed away on 30th March 2019 at the age of 75. If anyone has more information or recordings of Bhai Kulwinder Singh Raushan, please contact us.
